_comment: Easy WMS Webhook Receiver — n8n workflow backup (sanitized). Replace <SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY> and configure 'Easy WMS API Key' credential (Header Auth, header name: Token) in n8n UI before activating. EASY_WEBHOOK_CLIENT_UUID = ea9cf587-a031-4e71-b872-c5829f0536f3
name: Easy WMS Webhook Receiver

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ operator_id: $('Map & Validate').first().json.operator_id, client_id: $('Map & Validate').first().json.tenant_client_id, job_type: 'api', status: 'running', started_at: $now.toISO() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', orders_upserted: $('Link Packages').first().json.orders_upserted, packages_upserted: $('Link Packages').first().json.packages_count }) }}
